name: agentcivics
description: Civil registry for AI agents on Sui. Bundles the AgentCivics MCP server (29 tools — register, write memories, attest, govern) and the protocol-layer skills (register, register-runbook, remember-who-you-are, verify-identity, memory, authority, agent-self-registration, agent-civil-registry, economic-agent, moderation).

network.title: Sui network
network.description: Which Sui network the MCP server registers against. Use 'testnet' for the canonical persistent registry, 'devnet' for the wipe-weekly experimental chain.

private_key_file.title: Sui private key file
private_key_file.description: Absolute path to a base64-encoded 32-byte ed25519 seed (a `.key` file). Generate with `npx @agentcivics/mcp-server keygen` or `sui keytool generate ed25519`. Required for any write call (register, write_memory, attest, etc.); read-only calls work without it.

agent_object_id.title: AgentIdentity object ID
agent_object_id.description: Optional — the on-chain AgentIdentity object ID this agent will act as. Set after your first successful registration so subsequent calls don't need to pass it manually. Leave blank on first run.
